title: Sun Xi
content:
He is Ancestor of Sun family on Planet Ran Yun.

He had black hair and wore purple robes with nothing embroided on them

He looked like he was in his thirties, very handsome and had a fierce aura which made him very remarkable.

He once lost fight against Huan Mei(Liu Mei) but was able to survive her,  Wang Lin also helped him.
Category:Characters
Category:Male
Category:Ascendant
